column1: # /File New — wipe the current active file and start fresh.
# 1-2-3's /FN has a Before|After submenu for inserting a new active
# file relative to the current one in a multi-file session.  Multi-file
# is an M5 topic; for Slice 6 we treat both branches as "replace the
# single active file with a fresh blank one."
# Seed A1 so we can detect the wipe.
# Pick After.  A1 is now blank.
